== Notes for [[Item:Q116191|Q116191]] ==

The PEDIGREE of Garcia Ordonez (Seigneur) de VILLAMAYOR

Lady Diana's 29-Great Grandfather. Louis XVII's 23-Great Grandfather. HM Juan Carlos' 28-Great Grandfather. Philippe of Belgium's 21-Great Grandfather. HM Manuel II's 20-Great Grandfather. Grand Duke Henri's 20-Great Grandfather. "There is no king who has not had a slave among his ancestors, and no slave who has not had a king among his."
>> Good quote from Helen Keller - Garcia Ordonez Lord of VILLAMAYOR is my 21st great grandfather, King Richard the Lionhearted, my 27th great grandfather, and so on....(once you're in the family .. well, they all intermarried!) -cggpd <<<<
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Wife/Partner: Maria Lopez de ALMENARA
Children: Elvira Garcia de VILLAMAYOR ; Fernan Garcia de VILLAMAYOR ; Ruy Garcia de VILLAMAYOR
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
_______ _______ _______ _______ ______ ______ ______ ______ _____ ____ ____
/ -- Garcia Fernandez (Conde) de AZA + ==&=> [ 255 ,Ac,pmQY,&]
/ -- Garcia Garces de AZA
/ \ -- Nuna Nunez de SOBRADO + ==&=> [ 255 ,,XY,&]
/ -- Garcia Garces (5th Sn.) de AZA
/ \ -- Elvira de TORO + ====> [ 255 ,ac,ptm,&]
/ -- Garcia Garces (6th Sn.) de AZA
| \ / -- Pedro Fruelas de TRAVA + ==&=> [ 255 ,Agc,mQY,&]
| \ -- Eva (Perez) de TRAVA
/ \ -- Mayor (Armengol) de URGEL + ==&=> [ 255 ,aC,ptmY,&] / -- Ordono Garcia de AZA | \ / -- Pedro Fruelas de TRAVA + ==&=> [ 255 ,Agc,mQY,&] | | / -- Bermudo Perez (Conde) de TRASTAMARA (? - 1161?) | | / \ -- Urraca Frolaz de ATRANGA + ==&=> [ 255 ,c,pXY,&] | \ -- Sancha Bermudez de TRAVA | \ / -- Henry (II) of BURGUNDY + ==&=> [ 255 ,Hg,Y,&] | \ -- Urraca Henriques (Infanta) of PORTUGAL (1113? - ?) / \ -- Teresa Alfonso of CASTILE (of LEON) + ==&=> [ 255 ,AC,ptmQY,&] - Garcia Ordonez (Sn.) de VILLAMAYOR \ / -- Martin Diaz SALVADORES | / -- Diego Martinez (Sn.) de VILLAMAYOR | / \ -- Maria Garcia (Senora) de VILLAMAYOR \ -- Maria Diaz de VILLAMAYOR
\ -- Maria PONCE de MINERVA

http://fabpedigree.com/s084/f333356.htm

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
